{{Infobox character
| name = Sandviper Kral
| aliases = Kral
| parents = {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Sandviper sect chief}}
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|awls with heavy green-light gleaming spikes, corrosive green madra}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|young chief, future Sandviper chief, prince, [[Highgold]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Sandvipers]], [[Sandviper sect]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Blackflame (novel)|Blackflame]]
}}

''See also: [[Sandviper Kral Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Kral was the twenty-two-year-old heir to the [[Sandviper sect]] and the son of its chief, Gokren. Recognized as a [[Highgold]] and often referred to as the young chief due to his significant influence, he possessed a commanding presence that could shift from an imposing leader to a mischievous rogue depending on his mood. While he was highly dedicated to the pursuit of [[sacred arts]], he was also characterized by various personal flaws, including arrogance, irritability, laziness, and occasional cruelty. In combat, he utilized awls infused with corrosive green madra to strike his enemies. Kral was known for his kindness toward the exiled [[Jai Long]] and [[Jai Chen]], being the only member of his sect to offer them hospitality and companionship. However, his life ended when he was killed by an [[Iron]]-ranked individual who used a hidden weapon to stab him in the back. While [[Jai Long]] initially attempted to frame the death as a heroic end in battle to protect [[Jai Chen]], the reality of his death by a cowardly strike brought significant shame to the [[Sandviper sect]] and his father.}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|As the son of the [[Sandviper sect]] chief, Kral is a prince and the young chief of the [[Sandvipers]]. Dressed in fine black furs and bearing a green serpent on his arm, this [[Highgold]] practitioner possesses an [[Iron body]]. He fights using awls equipped with heavy spikes that crawl with corrosive green-light madra. Despite his status, it is noted that he would require extreme good fortune to ever progress past the [[Truegold]] level. Kral's life ended when he was killed by an [[Iron]], a killer who was subsequently taken to the [[Blackflame Empire]] to be sheltered by a young [[Underlord]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">17</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Sandvipers]] refer to Kral as the young chief.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7">''Soulsmith'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Kral is the young chief of the [[Sandvipers]] and the future [[Sandviper chief]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Kral wears fine black furs.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8">''Soulsmith'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Kral has a green serpent on his arm.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Kral uses awls with heavy green-light gleaming spikes as weapons.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Kral is a prince.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9">''Soulsmith'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Kral is a member of the [[Sandvipers]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Kral uses awls that crawl with corrosive green madra.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Kral will never make it past [[Truegold]] without extreme good fortune.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Kral is at the [[Highgold]] level.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Kral is the son of the [[Sandviper sect]] chief.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15">''Soulsmith'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Kral uses awls as weapons.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Kral is a [[Highgold]] of the [[Sandvipers]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c18">''Soulsmith'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Kral has an [[Iron body]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Kral is a character.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Kral was killed by an [[Iron]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19">''Soulsmith'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Kral's killer was taken to the [[Blackflame Empire]] and sheltered by a young [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Kral was stabbed in the back by an [[Iron]] child with a hidden weapon.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c2">''Blackflame'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] wants to take revenge for Kral.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6">''Blackflame'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Sandviper Kral]] is one of the few people who talks to [[Jai Chen]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21">''Blackflame'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Chen]] asks if [[Lindon]] killed young master Kral.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|“Kral,” Jai Long said, and the young chief’s head poked out.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
